feed.title: SAP Community - Support Services
feed.subtitle: Support Services Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Public Cloud 2308- Message no. F5053- Special G/L indicator H is not defined for down payments.
entry.content:
I am unable to post the customer security deposit as a downpayment request using the spl.G/L indicator "H". The system throwing me the below error.

Special G/L indicator H is not defined for down payments

Message no. F5053

Diagnosis

The specified special G/L indicator is not classified as "down payment" or not listed in the list of the target special G/L indicators for indicator "F".

System Response

The entry is not accepted.

Procedure

Enter an allowed special G/L indicator or initiate a change of the default settings.

Is there any way we can achieve this in public cloud 2308.

I will be very glad if some one respond and help me out from this.

Regards,

Basha.

entry.title: Mainstream support 4/HANA
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

In my company we have implemented SAP 4/HANA version 2021 and i don't understand if the mainstream support ends in 2027 or in 2040.

If it ends in 2027 what are the consequences.

Thank for the answers,

Antonio

entry.title: Crystal Reports - Connection
entry.content: Hello. I have a bunch of log files that I need to pull data from and want to pull them into Crystal Reports. What connection do I use to connect to *.log files? Is this possible?

entry.title: What are the integration capabilities of SAP EHS with other SAP modules or external systems?
entry.content: What are the integration capabilities of SAP EHS with other SAP modules or external systems?

entry.title: How does SAP TM handle route determination and optimization?
entry.content: How does SAP TM handle route determination and optimization?

entry.title: Public Cloud-2308_Income Tax Depreciation-India
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

As we know the depreciation treatment for Income tax depreciation for India is a block concept. How we can achieve this in S4 HANA Public Cloud.

The solution provided in Asset Accounting Scope ID- J62 and the process explained in help.sap.com is navigating the way to update the values manually for the block assets.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/cdba0feaf54a493385fe0394122202c6.html?q=India%20Income%20tax%20depreciation%20in%20asset%20accounting.

The below applications are available to update the values manually for the block assets.

· Assign Opening WDV to Blocks – Allows to enter the opening WDV.

· Update Asset Transaction Details – Allows to enter the asset transaction details.

· Adjustment to Asset Block Opening WDV/ Transactions- Allows to change the values for WDV and Transactions.

· Income Tax Depreciation Calculation Report – In this application, the values entered in the above 3 applications are being displayed.

But the requirement is, once the opening WDV is loaded the acquisitions should get added to the WDV automatically and the transfers retirements should get reduced from WDV automatically without entering the values manually.

Kindly suggest the way how this requirement can be achieved. Which depreciation key would be used for tax depreciation for WDV method from the standard delivered. As we do not have option to make any changes to the depreciation keys.

Regards,

Basha.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA exercises (Tutorial)
entry.content:
Hello, I'm a learner to SAP S/4HANA, and I guess I have troubleshooting in my account that I can't go to do any of the exercises I don't know why ?

Anyone can help please

Thank you

Best Regards

entry.title: problem with creating new customer
entry.content:
Hi,

What I can do: I am creating new customer but after all step I can't save it, because I got this error:

Enter Role for Customer Sales Area. ( CRM003 /CRM004 /CRM000 /PSSP01 /CRM005 /FLCU01 /CR )

I have tried many times again. 

Please help me.

#helpme #newcustomer #error

entry.title: Help needed in my VBA code SAP logon / SAP Scripting & Excel Interaction in VBA
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I am really new to SAP VBA. I am trying to create a code which involves entering 4 transactions in SAP and exporting a report from each. I would like to have these four reports exported into one excel file (preferably into 4 different sheets).

I have managed to create a code that enters all these transactions and then exports the Excel file, but it is empty.

May I please ask for your support here to a newbie like me?

Here's my code:

If Not IsObject(application) Then
Set SapGuiAuto = GetObject("SAPGUI")
Set application = SapGuiAuto.GetScriptingEngine
End If

If Not IsObject(connection) Then
Set connection = application.Children(0)
End If

If Not IsObject(session) Then
Set session = connection.Children(0)
End If

If IsObject(WScript) Then
WScript.ConnectObject session, "on"
WScript.ConnectObject application, "on"
End If

' Create Excel object
Dim ExcelApp
Set ExcelApp = CreateObject("Excel.Application")

' Open Excel workbook
Dim ExcelWorkbook
Set ExcelWorkbook = ExcelApp.Workbooks.Add

' Transaction 1: VKM1
session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").text = "/nVKM1"
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtKKBER-LOW").text = "2000"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtP_VARI").text = "/TE CCA 2000"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtP_VARI").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtP_VARI").caretPosition = 12
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[3]/menu[1]/menu[2]").select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[1,0]").select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[1,0]").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_PATH").text = "C:\Users\strawan\Documents\Scripts\"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILENAME").text = "VKM1.xls"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").text = "4103"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").caretPosition = 4
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[3]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/btnSPOP-OPTION1").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[3]").press

' Transaction 2: VKM2
session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").text = "/nVKM2"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtKKBER-LOW").text = "2000"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtP_VARI").text = "/credit"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtP_VARI").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtP_VARI").caretPosition = 7
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[3]/menu[1]/menu[2]").select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[1,0]").select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[1,0]").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_PATH").text = "C:\Users\strawan\Documents\Scripts\"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILENAME").text = "VKM2.xls"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").text = "4103"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").caretPosition = 4
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[3]").press

' Transaction 3: ZFIAR045
session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").text = "/nZFIAR045"
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtSP$00001-LOW").text = "2000"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtSP$00001-HIGH").text = "9999999999"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtSP$00007-LOW").text = "1028"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtSP$00006-LOW").text = "110000"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtSP$00014-LOW").text = "2000"
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtSP$00014-LOW").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/ctxtSP$00014-LOW").caretPosition = 4
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[0]/menu[4]/menu[2]").select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[1,0]").select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[1,0]").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_PATH").text = "C:\Users\strawan\Documents\Scripts\"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILENAME").text = "ZFIAR045.xls"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").text = "4103"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").caretPosition = 4
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[3]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[3]").press

' Transaction 4: ATB
session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlIMAGE_CONTAINER/shellcont/shell/shellcont[0]/shell").doubleClickNode "F00009"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[17]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/txtENAME-LOW").text = "kazmag"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/txtENAME-LOW").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/txtENAME-LOW").caretPosition = 6
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[8]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/mbar/menu[0]/menu[1]/menu[2]").select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[1,0]").select
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUBSCREEN_STEPLOOP:SAPLSPO5:0150/sub:SAPLSPO5:0150/radSPOPLI-SELFLAG[1,0]").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[0]").press
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_PATH").text = "C:\Users\strawan\Documents\Scripts\"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILENAME").text = "ATB.xls"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").text = "4103"
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").setFocus
session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/ctxtDY_FILE_ENCODING").caretPosition = 4
session.findById("wnd[1]/tbar[0]/btn[11]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[15]").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[3]").press
' Save Excel workbook
Dim FilePath
FilePath = "C:\Users\strawan\Documents\Scripts\CombinedData.xlsx"
ExcelWorkbook.SaveAs FilePath

' Close Excel workbook and quit Excel application
ExcelWorkbook.Close
ExcelApp.Quit

' Release Excel objects
Set ExcelWorkbook = Nothing
Set ExcelApp = Nothing

I would appreciate your help! Thank you.

entry.title: can we extend the text field character limit from 50 to 500 in fbl5n?
entry.content: We have a requirement to extend the character limit in FBL5N text field from 50 to 500. Kindly let us know for any possibilities.

entry.title: SAP Note/KBA 1759784 is being updated..since 12/2023
entry.content:
SAP Note/KBA 1759784 is being updated has been the status since December 2023 and again today.

How long does it take? 

Is there another path to accessing the recommended solution to my issue?

entry.title: Вопросы и ответы по технологиям
entry.content:
Товар уже определен на более высоком уровне в структуре продукта [Спецификация - компоненты - Код компонента][line: 4] , '№ строки сетки 1' [Сообщение 3566-12]

я должен переработать отходы и использовать их для производство продукции 

но выводит мне такую ошибку

entry.title: PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) Topics cannot be filtered
entry.content:
Dear Team,

For the last 4-5 days, I am not able to see the questions raised under the Tag "PLM Enterprise Asset Management (EAM)/Plant Maintenance (PM) Topics"

Last Week : When i click the tag, it will list all the questions under this Tag

This week: When i click the tag, it is taking to SAP Community, this has huge questions.

Is there any change to the system ? 

Regards

Terence

entry.title: SAP B1 Cloud ControlCenter Addon To-Install Struck
entry.content:
Dear Team,

While deploying extension on Cloud, We are facing issue that add-on stays in 'To Install' status in Cloud Control Center. I have followed troubleshoot method on Community but no luck. Please help us to resolve the issue.

Community-Page for troubleshooting CCC Addon issues 

Regards,

Maaz

entry.title: Create service call from equipment card
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am creating a service call from equipment card screen and I want to pass equipment card data to service call screen. It is similar to how pass the customer information from equipment card to service call automatically.

Please someone guide me how can I do it.

Regards,

Rakesh

entry.title: Transition from SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM with help from SAP Enterprise Support
entry.content:
SAP Solution Manager is in mainstream maintenance until the end of 2027. When it comes to application lifecycle management (ALM), SAP Cloud ALM is the go-to ALM platform for all SAP customers. We highly recommend to complete the move to SAP Cloud ALM before this date. 

To help you with this transition, we have several E-Learnings available in the SAP Enterprise Support value map for Application Lifecycle Management and SAP Cloud ALM.

Value maps provide self-paced learnings, expert-led live sessions, collaborative forums, and access to SAP experts; all included as part of your SAP Cloud subscription.

Why Choose SAP Cloud ALM?

This solution is a cloud-based tool for ALM, which is available as part of SAP support offerings, covering all stages of the application lifecycle, from discovery of cloud solution capabilities to implementation, operations, and continuous innovation as well as business value realization and enhancement. More specifically:

  • SAP Cloud ALM delivers ALM for the intelligent, sustainable enterprise, while offering foundational support for your landscape.
  • SAP Cloud ALM comes with lower cost of operation and maintenance, is easy to adopt and use, while providing innovative functionality for your business.
  • You can add SAP Focused Run to address advanced operations needs and to manage a significant on-premise footprint.
  • SAP Solution Manager is in mainstream maintenance until the end of 2027. Ideally you should complete the transition to SAP Cloud ALM before this date.

Where to Access?

3 Easy Steps:  

  1. One-time sign-up for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support, is required  
  2. Access value maps
  3. Navigate to the SAP Enterprise Support value map for Application Lifecycle Management and SAP Cloud ALM

Once in the value map, we welcome you to collaborate in our forums, ask questions or “Request a Call” to speak with one of our experts for further help. Value maps are easy to navigate but an on-boarding call allows us to tailor the conversation to suit your needs and highlight specific content for you.  

Whether you're just starting out, discovering SAP Cloud ALM capabilities, in the midst of implementation, or navigating through an upgrade, our value map will steer you in the right direction.

Got a question about the value maps, or our content?
Leverage the “ask questions” feature in the value map or contact us: sapesvaluemaps@sap.com

entry.title: Exploring SAP support portals & processes
entry.content:
Hi everyone! This is Karoline, from SAP Customer Interaction Center Brazil. To those who are not familiar with the CIC, our team provides a central point of contact for non-technical queries such as existing support cases, SAP for Me navigation, S-user ID and Universal ID.

I'm passionate about learning and sharing content, so I want to hear from the community what you find most relevant.

Is there any topics regarding SAP support portals and processes you would like to find out more about? Please share your questions and suggestions below so our team can work on it!

entry.title: Exploring SAP support portals & processes
entry.content:
Hi everyone! This is Karoline, from SAP Customer Interaction Center Brazil. To those who are not familiar with the CIC, our team provides a central point of contact for non-technical queries such as existing support cases, SAP for Me navigation, S-user ID and Universal ID.

I'm passionate about learning and sharing content, so I want to hear from the community what you find most relevant.

Is there any topics regarding SAP support portals and processes you would like to find out more about? Please share your questions and suggestions below so our team can work on it!

entry.title: Does SAP Service&Support limit quota for raise service request or cases or expert chat & charge fee
entry.content:
i see information in this question:https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/does-sap-charge-for-incidents/qaq-p/12151650

but my organization said it will depend on the contact which why we have S-User to use, and if we raise too much cases to Service&Report, they will be charge fee back to the organization in end of each year ?

entry.title: Custom Fields and Logic -- APS_CUSTOM_FIELD_MAINTENANCE_SRV -- 500 Internal Server Error
entry.content:
Hi,  I tried to add some custom fields to an existing ui5 application using Custom Fields and Logic Application (CF&L) . When I add the field i am getting a time out error .please help me resolve the issue.

1.  I opened the (CF&L) app and  added a code list to EHFND_TASK_DEFINITION .

2. When i click on create in the backend there is a OData call made to the service sap/opu/odata/sap/APS_CUSTOM_FIELD_MAINTENANCE_SRV/$batch? and an 500 error is recieved

3. I checked the Service in the Gateway Client and it is loading the metadata well . I also Ran the Same Post Query with the same payload that was sent from the Browser. 

I am getting the message as 

<code>CX_APS_CUSTOM_FIELD_TECH</code>

<message>Operation failed. Report an incident on component BC-SRV-APS-EXT-FLD.</message>

Thanks for all the help and your time.
